summary: Complete E2E testing of ParaQuemDoar admin panel clone - All backend APIs (20/20) passed, all frontend flows working correctly

minor.issue: JWT warning - HMAC key is 27 bytes (below 32 bytes recommended)

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is a React rendering issue in donations table map but does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend JWT secret key warning - consider using a longer secret key (32+ bytes) for production security
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test donations with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working correctly. Admin panel at /donaspainel with login/dashboard. PIX payment page at /doacao/pix generates real QR codes using backend PIX key. Auto-refresh every 10s on dashboard. Full donation flow tested: PIX generate -> create donation -> mark copied -> verify in list/stats.

backend_apis: POST /api/admin/login - correct credentials returns JWT token ✓
GET /api/admin/donations - with valid token returns list ✓
GET /api/admin/pix/generate?value=X - returns valid EMV BR Code ✓
frontend_pages: Login page /donaspainel - username/password fields, submit button ✓
Dashboard shows stats cards (Total Arrecadado, Total de Doacoes, Codigos Copiados) ✓
Dashboard shows donations table with Data/Hora, Valor, Status, Codigo PIX ✓
Dashboard has PIX key config section with Edit button ✓
PIX payment page /doacao/pix shows QR Code generated from backend ✓
PIX payment page shows copy-and-paste code with copy button ✓
Homepage, donation page, and donation value page all load correctly ✓
